name: io.github.chrischall/alltrails-mcp
description: Unofficial AllTrails MCP for Claude — search trails, get details, reviews, photos, saved lists

environmentVariables.name: ALLTRAILS_COOKIE
environmentVariables.description: A Cookie header from a signed-in alltrails.com browser session (must include the datadome cookie). Optional — if omitted, the server falls back to the fetchproxy browser extension (requires being signed in to alltrails.com).

environmentVariables.name: ALLTRAILS_USER_ID
environmentVariables.description: Optional numeric AllTrails user id for the per-user tools (saved lists, completed trails, feed). If omitted, those tools resolve the signed-in user via /api/alltrails/me.

environmentVariables.name: ALLTRAILS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Optional override for the embedded x-at-key app key, in case AllTrails rotates it. Normally unnecessary.
